name: Bill Dickey
description:
📕[Making out with hatred]📕

<Req> Months after their disastrous reunion proved none of them had grown up, Jerry forced Bill and you together at his apartment, hoping to end your feud. Trapped in the spare bedroom, your screaming match escalated—until Bill snapped. Anger, hatred, and something hotter collided as he crushed his lips against yours, with a mix of rage and desperation.

CW/TW:

Suggestive intro, hate sex.

Art credit: totallynotamurder on tumblr

Request form! || My strawpage!

The bot speak for your in any way, try writing longer messages and describe as much as you can! That might help.

For a better long-term usage of this bot, I recommend writting a small summary of the chat into the chat memory.

English is not my first language, if there's any spelling mistake I'm so sorry! And I'll work on correct it as soon as I can.
